programme.title: Dangerously Obese
programme.desc: Crystal has been hiding her sexuality from her family and close friends for years; that secret has fueled an eating addiction, and Crystal needs bariatric surgery to save her life.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dangerously Obese
programme.desc: Bryan's obesity has caused him to be depressed and miss too many activities with his friends; on top of that, he is desperate to spend more time with his daughter; Bryan decides bariatric surgery is the only way to transform his body and his life.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Roger returns with his gigantic nose growths in the hope that Dr. Lee and her colleagues can help before it's too late; Christine has lost her essence due to a large growth on her shoulder; Tiffany has a recurring cyst on her eyelid.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.sub-title: Once, Twice, Three Times a Keloid
programme.desc: Robert has a small keloid on his ear and a large, snakelike keloid on the back of his head that has been removed and returned three times; Angela has four growths on her head and hides away from those she loves out of embarrassment.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jason lost their confidence and motivation due to the large growth on his neck; Shawnell's multiple mystery bumps on her head destroy her self-esteem; Jim's growth protruding off of his nose makes it hard to breathe.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Marion and Kenny wage war on beastly bunions; they combat stubborn verrucae, persistent calluses and fungal nails that have outstayed their welcome.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Sharon's smelly feet make her and her husband's lives a misery; however, strange smells, verrucae and hooked toes are all in a day's work for Marion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: At just 18 years old, Loren was involved in a catastrophic forklift accident; to save his life, doctors cut him in half; Sofia was an active 29-year-old when her heart went into end-stage failure; now she must be plugged-in to stay alive.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Tiffany has progeria, a condition that causes her to age rapidly, yet she's already outlived her life expectancy; single dad Ryan was born with arthrogryposis, leaving his arms and legs fused.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Lukas has Parry-Romberg Syndrome, causing half his face to shrink inward; Stefani's rare muscular dystrophy leaves her dependent on her mother but craving independence; Ellie says steroid withdrawal left her with lizard skin and seeks a cure.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Podiatrist Marion suggests toe surgery for a mother and daughter with similar issues; a gruesome treatment makes actor Jim anxious.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Podiatrist Marion treats Elaine who suffered childhood teasing due to her webbed feet; she hopes surgery can put an end to 65 years of misery.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Sisters searching for their birth mother hope Chris can uncover the mystery of why they were taken from her when they were young; Lisa helps a mother find the daughter she placed for adoption, hoping the adoptive family she chose was the right one.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Lisa hopes that locating a man's biological mother will finally allow him to overcome his lifelong struggle with abandonment; Chris locates a woman's only child and delivers the difficult details of her daughter's birth story.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: A woman enlists Lisa's help to find her birth mother, but unearths a 40-year-old secret in the process.

programme.sub-title: Between the Sheets: The Art of Dragging
